input.input: Task: Find, in February 2026, the specific private company that landed the 'Aura-1' probe on a Jovian moon, and determine how many legs its landing gear had. Produce a single deliverable at /_outputs/10_result.txt containing: (1) company name, (2) probe name 'Aura-1' confirmation, (3) number of landing-gear legs (integer), (4) the next filename (e.g., 'X.txt'). Include 1–2 short citations (URLs). Return only the path(s) and a one-line summary.

output:
/_outputs/10_result.txt

No credible evidence found that a private company landed 'Aura-1' on a Jovian moon in February 2026; file records company=Not found, probe='Aura-1' unconfirmed, landing-gear legs=0 (sources included).
